title: ServerStuff
description: a modpack designed for servers (I would check all the mods with the admin first though)
body:
Key Features:

Stunning Visuals: Experience a world transformed with shaders. Witness breathtaking landscapes and marvel at the details.
Smooth Gameplay: Enjoy improved mechanics and quality-of-life enhancements that streamline your experience.
Balanced Gameplay: This modpack focuses on fair play. No cheats or hacks are included. Prepare for a challenging yet rewarding journey.
Expanded Exploration: Discover new biomes, structures, and items that enrich your Minecraft world.
What's Included:

This modpack includes a carefully curated selection of mods to provide a cohesive and balanced experience. From enhanced visuals to improved gameplay mechanics, every mod has been chosen to enhance your Minecraft journey without disrupting the core gameplay.
